system.description: Drum magazines hold much more ammunition than any other magazine can fit. Reloading a drum magazine is slower than box magazines, and will require a Major action instead of the typical Minor action to reload a prepared magazine. A given magazine will work on any weapon that can use them, no matter the actual dimensions or magazine size required. The magazine’s capacity is equal to 3 times the ammo capacity of the gun it is being used with. Magazines do not take up Load when loaded into a firearm.
